Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Railteco Electric Co., Ltd. (Suzhou).

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Suzhou Ruixin Rail Transit Technology Co., Ltd. (operating under the international brand Railteco Electric) presents a classic case of an export-oriented trading node established by a larger manufacturing group. Its USCC (91320000) indicates a provincial-level registration in Jiangsu, specifically located in Zhangjiagang, a major port city on the Yangtze River. The critical intelligence lies in the email domain '@railteco.com'. Railteco is a well-known Chinese manufacturer of railway equipment (bogies, wheelsets, wagons). However, this specific entity ('Ruixin'/'Railteco Electric') exhibits a paid-in capital of only 1M RMB and 0 insured employees. This structure confirms it is an asset-light, specialized trading and export agency shell created by the Railteco Group to handle international sales, software development, and technical services for its railway products, rather than the primary heavy-manufacturing foundry itself.
